reasoning: The question asks if the yield of the AA US Corporate Index will increase by the listed resolution dates compared to its value on 2025-10-26. However, no specific resolution dates are listed in the prompt, although the question close date is 2026-01-24. Over short horizons (e.g., 3-6 months from October 2025 to early 2026), corporate yields closely approximate a random walk. Given the lack of a defined horizon and the future reference point, it is highly uncertain whether yields will increase or decrease from whatever their level turns out to be in October 2025. Therefore, a generic random walk prediction of ~50% is the most defensible baseline.
